prd.title: User Authentication Service
prd.summary: Provides secure authentication and authorization for the platform.

architecture.name: Auth API
architecture.description: Handles authentication requests and token issuance.

architecture.name: User Database
architecture.description: Stores user credentials and profile information.

security_requirements.description: Passwords must be stored using bcrypt with a work factor of 12.
All communication must be over TLS 1.2 or higher.

prd.title: Sample Product
prd.summary: A brief overview of the sample product.

security_requirements.description: Data must be encrypted at rest

architecture.name: API Gateway
architecture.description: Routes incoming authentication requests to the appropriate service endpoints.

architecture.name: Auth Service
architecture.description: Handles credential verification, token issuance, and session management.

security_requirements.description: All passwords must be stored using bcrypt hashing with a work factor of 12.
All communication must be encrypted using TLS 1.3.

requirement: Build secure credit card payment service compliant with PCI-DSS

prd.title: Secure Credit Card Payment Service
prd.summary: A service to process credit card payments securely, adhering to PCI-DSS requirements.
functional_requirements: Accept credit card payments via API
Tokenize card data to avoid storing raw PAN
Maintain immutable audit logs for all payment actions
non_functional_requirements: Scalable to handle up to 10,000 transactions per second
Response time less than 200 ms for authorization requests
Encryption at rest and in transit
Audit trail retention for at least 12 months
Disaster recovery with RPO < 5 minutes and RTO < 30 minutes
assumptions: Merchants will provision API credentials securely
Acquiring banks support standard ISO 8583 or API protocols
Infrastructure runs within a VPC with controlled network access
Compliance team will provide periodic PCI-DSS validation reports

architecture.name: API Gateway
architecture.description: Handles inbound API requests, performs request validation, rate limiting, and routes traffic to backend services.

architecture.name: Payment Service
architecture.description: Core business logic for payment processing, tokenization, transaction lifecycle management, and integration with acquiring banks.

architecture.name: Secure Data Store
architecture.description: Encrypted storage for transaction records, tokenized card data, and audit logs, using AES-256 at rest.

architecture.name: Compliance Monitoring Service
architecture.description: Continuously monitors PCI-DSS compliance controls, generates alerts, and provides compliance reporting dashboards.

security_requirements.description: All cardholder data must be encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.
Sensitive data must be stored encrypted with AES-256.
Access to cardholder data must be restricted to authorized personnel via role‑based access control.
